macro_context: Split market: S&P at record 7,599 (AI boom, ninth weekly gain) but BTC at $72,145 (record $2.97B ETF outflow streak). Oil $92-108 from Hormuz crisis driving inflation fears. FOMC June 16-17 all but priced as hold. NFP Friday is marquee event.

XAG-USD.note: Patient holds 26.92oz, stop $74.00. BofA target $85.93 avg 2026.

BTC-USD.note: CRITICAL: Record ETF outflows. Below $72K targets $68-70K. MSTR narrative damaged.

ETH-USD.note: Hidden bullish divergence + whale accumulation. Needs $2,500 breakout.

MSTR.note: First standalone BTC sale. GF Value $118.67 = overvalued. Watch BTC.

trade_ideas.rationale: Maintain 26.92oz remnant. Stop $74.00 intact ($1.22 buffer). Silver $120 prophecy at 0.8 conviction. BofA raised 2026 target to $85.93. Sixth consecutive supply deficit year supports structural bull. No add until 6B+ consensus + volume normalization.
RSI recovered from 28 oversold. 7B/4S but blocked by distribution volume. Goldman/JPM/UBS targets $5-6K. FOMC June 16-17 risk. Wait for volume normalization <1.5x AND 7B+ sustained.

Record ETF outflows ($2.97B), MSTR narrative damage, trending-down regime. RSI recovering from extreme oversold 20-24 but no structural reversal. System BTC 3d verdict accuracy only 20.4% (n=162). Wait for regime flip + ETF flow reversal.

system_improvements_implemented: Disabled 4 redundant regime signals (adx_regime_switch 49%, bocpd 51.1%, vol_ratio_regime 48.8%, choppiness 51.7%) — all degraded from 58-67% small-sample accuracy to near-coinflip. Drift (58.9%) and amihud (58.6%) retained.
Raised directional accuracy gate 43% → 44% to catch marginal BUY noise in bearish regime.

system_improvements_proposed.title: Exponential-decay signal weighting
system_improvements_proposed.impact: Auto-downweight degraded signals without manual DISABLED_SIGNALS entries

system_improvements_proposed.title: Soft regime assignments (sigmoid thresholds)
system_improvements_proposed.impact: Eliminate hard regime flip-flopping causing coin-flip accuracy

system_improvements_proposed.title: Rolling Spearman IC recomputation (14d, daily)
system_improvements_proposed.impact: Leading indicator of accuracy decay — catches degradation 1-2 weeks earlier

system_improvements_proposed.title: Regime-conditional ATR stop multipliers
system_improvements_proposed.impact: Adaptive stops: tighter in ranging, wider in trending

system_improvements_proposed.title: Inverse-volatility position sizing
system_improvements_proposed.impact: Consistent risk per instrument despite 4x volatility differences

risk_warnings: BTC at critical $72K support — breakdown to $68-70K would pressure MSTR further and trigger Patient watchlist BTC entry review
XAG stop $74.00 only $1.22 below current — monitor closely. ATR 0.4% = minimal vol, but any momentum shift could test stop.
NFP Friday Jun 6 is the week's binary event — strong print = hawkish (bad for metals/crypto), miss = dovish (good for all risk assets)
FOMC June 16-17 approaching — market may front-run hawkish hold given 4 dissenters at April meeting
MicroStrategy BTC sale precedent — if Saylor sells again, narrative destruction accelerates
research_highlights: Systemic BUY_ACCURACY_COLLAPSE pattern: 15-33% BUY accuracy vs 56-87% SELL accuracy across nearly all signals. Bearish regime signature.
4 of 6 regime signals degraded to near-coinflip — small-sample illusion at re-enable (67% on 158-207 samples → 49-52% on 410-519 samples).
Quant research: exponential-decay signal weighting (arxiv 1802.07543) is the simplest high-impact improvement. Thompson sampling and soft regime assignments are promising medium-term.
TradingAgents v0.2.5 (60K+ GitHub stars) — multi-agent bull/bear debate architecture supports Claude. Potential Layer 2 improvement.
BofA raised silver 2026 avg to $85.93/oz (+32%). Sixth consecutive supply deficit year.
